title: How to Pick YouTube Video Topics People Are Searching For
description:
Most new creators guess at what to make — and wonder why nobody's watching. The fix is simple: let YouTube tell you.

Go to the YouTube search bar and type in any topic related to your niche. The autocomplete suggestions that appear are pulled directly from what real people are searching for right now. Every single one is a video idea with a built-in audience.

Pick one that fits your channel, make the video, and you're no longer just creating content — you're answering questions people are already asking.

That's the difference between a video that gets found and one that doesn't.

🔔 Subscribe for more tips on growing your YouTube channel.
